backend_service.description: Specifies the backend service to which the TCP proxy forwards traffic, must be in the same region as the proxy.

description.description: Defines the user-provided text description for the TCP proxy resource, providing additional context or metadata.

name.description: Unique name for the regional TCP proxy, adhering to Google Cloud's naming conventions.

proxy_bind.description: Indicates whether the proxy should bind to the IP address and port specified. Only applicable for regional target TCP proxies.

proxy_header.description: Specifies the type of proxy header to be sent to the backend, determining how client connection information is passed.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout configuration for operations, specifying the maximum duration for creating, updating, or deleting the resource.
